# Changelog Update Prompt

Update CHANGELOG.md by extracting user-facing changes from session history files.

## Target Version (Optional)

<!-- If provided, moves Unreleased section to this version -->
<!-- Example: v0.4.0 -->
v0.4.1

## Date Range (Optional)

<!-- Limit session history analysis to specific date range -->
<!-- Example: 2025-12-20 to 2026-01-01 -->

[Leave empty to process all sessions since last changelog update]

## Additional Context

<!-- Any special notes about this changelog update -->
<!-- Example: "Focus on user-facing features, skip internal refactoring" -->

[Optional additional guidance for the agent]
